en.commentary:
The portable power station market settled into its mature phase in 2026. LFP battery chemistry is now the baseline — every unit I recommend uses iron-phosphate cells rated for at least 4,000 cycles. The real competition plays out in charging speed, output headroom, and value per watt-hour of usable capacity.

The EcoFlow Delta 3 Plus earns the top position by solving the market's most persistent pain point: recharge time. A full 1,024Wh charge in 56 minutes is genuinely useful — you can top it off during a dinner break and leave with a full unit. X-Boost technology extends the effective output to 2,200W, covering the high-draw appliances most people actually care about: hair dryers, electric kettles, countertop ovens. At $549, nothing else in the 1kWh class touches it on price-to-performance.

The Bluetti Elite 200 V2 makes the most compelling case in the 2kWh segment. Two kilowatt-hours for $899 used to be a flagship price. The Elite 200 V2 delivers that capacity in a chassis that Bluetti claims is 40% smaller than predecessor 2kWh units, with 6,000-cycle cells rated for roughly 17 years of daily use. For anyone replacing a gas generator for home backup, this is the right tool.

The EcoFlow Delta Pro 3 at $2,099 (sale) occupies a different category entirely. Four kilowatt-hours, 4,000W AC output, 120/240V split-phase support, and a path to 48kWh. For homeowners in hurricane corridors or wildfire-prone regions who plan for multi-day outages, this is the correct infrastructure investment.

Goal Zero's Yeti 1500X once defined the premium outdoor power station. Test data in 2026 shows 74% actual delivery efficiency against the stated 1,516Wh, and the stock charger takes 12.5 hours for a full cycle. The outdoor credibility is real, but the value calculation no longer works against modern alternatives priced hundreds of dollars lower.

highlights.title: EcoFlow Delta 3 Plus Resets the 1kWh Benchmark at $549
highlights.body: Fifty-six minutes to a full 1,024Wh charge is the number that defines this product. EcoFlow's X-Boost technology adds meaningful real-world flexibility by bridging appliances up to 2,200W on a rated 1,800W inverter, which means devices like hair dryers and countertop ovens — previously excluded from 1kWh-class stations — run without issue. The 4,000-cycle LFP battery and 5-year warranty remove the longevity question entirely. At $549 at Costco, this is the clearest buy-recommendation on this list.

highlights.title: Bluetti Elite 200 V2 Wins the Dollar-per-Wh Calculation at the 2kWh Tier
highlights.body: Two kilowatt-hours of LFP capacity for $899, with a 40-minute 0-to-80% charge time and 6,000-cycle cell ratings, represents a step change from what was available eighteen months ago. Bluetti's claim of a 40% volume reduction compared to the AC200P is credible from hands-on evaluation — the Elite 200 V2 sits in the same physical footprint as 1kWh competitors while doubling their capacity. For anyone running through a multi-day power outage with a refrigerator and critical devices to maintain, this is the tier to be in.

highlights.title: EcoFlow Delta Pro 3 Is the Only True Whole-Home Backup Option Here
highlights.body: The Delta Pro 3's 120/240V split-phase output is the feature that separates it from every other unit on this list. Most portable power stations can only supply 120V, which rules out hardwired home appliances, HVAC systems, and EV charging. The Delta Pro 3 handles all of them. Twenty-six recharging paths — including car alternator charging, solar, and generator integration — mean you can maintain the unit in genuinely off-grid or extended-outage scenarios. The $2,099 sale price positions it against a home generator installation, a comparison it holds up well.

highlights.title: Allpowers R1500 Lite Proves Budget Doesn't Mean Compromised
highlights.body: At $399, the R1500 Lite ships with genuine LFP chemistry, a 40-minute 0-to-80% charge cycle, and a 15ms UPS function that switches to battery power faster than a computer can register the interruption. That UPS capability at this price is unusual — most budget stations skip it. The reliability track record is shorter than the established brands on this list, which is why it sits at rank 6 rather than higher, but on pure specification value, nothing competes at this price point.

highlights.title: Goal Zero Yeti 1500X Can No Longer Justify Its Price
highlights.body: The Yeti 1500X earned its reputation in an era when Goal Zero was building products that outclassed the competition on durability and outdoor integration. That era is over. A 74% discharge efficiency in independent testing means the rated 1,516Wh is a ceiling, not a floor. The stock charger's 12.5-hour full-cycle time is a deal-breaker for emergency use. Goal Zero released a new Yeti 1500 LFP in 2026 that addresses these issues, but the 1500X sitting on retail shelves at $1,299 is the old design. Spend the money elsewhere.

zh-tw.commentary:
2026 年的行動電源站市場已經進入成熟期，LFP 磷酸鐵鋰電池是這個價位的標配，差異在充電速度、輸出能力，以及每瓦時你花了多少錢。

EcoFlow Delta 3 Plus 拿第一，因為它解決了這個品類最根本的問題：充電等待時間。1024Wh、56 分鐘充滿，這個組合在目前市場找不到等價的替代。X-Boost 技術讓實際可使用的電器上限到 2200W，吹風機、電熱水壺、小型烤箱都能跑。台灣售價約 NT$18,000，是這份榜單裡 CP 值最高的選擇。

Bluetti Elite 200 V2 是需要兩倍電量但不想要兩倍體積的最佳選擇。2073.6Wh 塞進比前代縮小 40% 的機身，6000 循環壽命換算大約是每天使用 17 年。NT$29,000 買到這樣的規格，颱風季備電用途來說實際上是最有說服力的選項之一。

EcoFlow Delta Pro 3 是不同層次的選手。4096Wh、4000W 輸出、支援 120/240V 雙電壓，擴充上限達 48kWh，適合工作室、診所，或是家裡有多台高耗電設備需要連續供電的場景。約 NT$68,000 的售價對應的是基礎設施投資，買的是安心感和實際的供電能力，不是消費性 3C。

Goal Zero Yeti 1500X 曾經是戶外備電的指標推薦，但 2026 年的實測數據讓它很難繼續站在這個位置。實際釋放容量只有標稱的 74%，原廠充電器需要 12.5 小時充滿，同樣預算放在現在的市場裡可以買到更好的東西。

highlights.title: EcoFlow Delta 3 Plus：NT$18,000 買到目前最強的 1kWh 方案
highlights.body: 56 分鐘充滿 1024Wh，這個充電速度在同級產品裡找不到競爭者。X-Boost 技術讓這台機器可以帶動標稱 2200W 以下的電器，一般 1kWh 級別電源站驅動不了的吹風機、電熱水壺、小型微波爐，Delta 3 Plus 都跑得動。LFP 電池 4000 循環壽命加上五年保固，長期使用成本低。台灣颱風季或戶外活動，這台是目前這個預算最直接的答案。

highlights.title: Bluetti Elite 200 V2：2kWh 區間每瓦時成本最低
highlights.body: NT$29,000 買到 2073.6Wh、6000 循環壽命的 LFP 電池，這個組合在 18 個月前至少要花兩倍的錢。機身比前代縮小 40% 是真實的，拿在手上不像是兩公斤瓦時容量的設備，40 分鐘充到 80% 讓它在停電後的恢復速度也很快。需要備用整台冰箱加幾個關鍵設備撐過颱風夜的用戶，這台的容量和成本比最合理。

highlights.title: EcoFlow Delta Pro 3：這份榜單唯一支援整棟供電的選項
highlights.body: 支援 120/240V 雙電壓是 Delta Pro 3 與其他所有機型的根本差異。大多數行動電源站只能輸出 120V，排除掉家裡的固定電器、冷暖氣、電動車充電。Delta Pro 3 全部都能支援。26 種充電輸入路徑包括汽車發電機、太陽能、市電，讓它在真正的長期停電場景下可以持續補充電力。約 NT$68,000 的特價，拿來跟安裝一台家用發電機比，不只省錢，而且安靜很多。

highlights.title: Allpowers R1500 Lite 用 NT$13,000 做到了旗艦才有的規格
highlights.body: NT$13,000 有 LFP 電池、40 分鐘充到 80%、加上真正的 15ms UPS 切換功能。UPS 這個功能在這個價位非常少見，大多數平價電源站直接省略，但對於需要保護電腦或 NAS 的場景，這台的切換速度快到電腦感覺不到瞬斷。品牌口碑比不上 EcoFlow 或 Jackery，這是它排在第六的原因，但純看規格對比，NT$13,000 以下找不到比它更完整的選擇。

highlights.title: Goal Zero Yeti 1500X 的品牌溢價在 2026 年已經說不過去
highlights.body: Yeti 1500X 建立口碑的年代，Goal Zero 確實做出了比競品更耐用、更整合的戶外電源方案。但 2026 年的實測數字很難看：實際釋放容量只有標稱的 74%，原廠充電器充滿需要 12.5 小時，NT$42,000 的預算放在現在的市場，可以買到容量更大、充電更快的選項，還有餘裕。Goal Zero 在 2026 年推出了新款 Yeti 1500 LFP 版本，那是不同的故事，但市面上還在賣的舊款 1500X 在這個價格沒有推薦理由。

en.commentary: This week's news for portable power stations is all about pricing movement. Amazon has pushed significant discounts across EcoFlow, Bluetti, Anker, and Jackery, with the Anker SOLIX C1000 Gen 2 dropping to $428.99 — a 46% discount from its $799 regular price, which is the kind of deal that changes the calculation for anyone on the fence. The EcoFlow Delta 3 Plus continues to lead the overall ranking on its combination of 1024Wh capacity, 2400W output, and 1-hour charging, maintaining the most compelling specs-to-price ratio in the mid-range tier. The Bluetti Elite 200 V2 holds second with its larger 2073Wh capacity and 2400W output, the better pick for extended outages or off-grid use where capacity matters more than portability. The EcoFlow Delta Pro 3 continues to dominate whole-home backup searches — at 4kWh expandable to 12kWh, it operates in a different category from the mid-range units on this list. The Anker SOLIX C1000 Gen 2 at current sale pricing ($428.99) represents genuinely strong value for 1kWh class stations, with the Guinness World Record for fastest-charging in its class backing up the spec claims.

highlights.title: Anker SOLIX C1000 Gen 2 at $429 Is the Week's Best Value Play
highlights.body: Amazon's April discount brought the Anker SOLIX C1000 Gen 2 down to $428.99 from $799. At that price, the Guinness World Record-holding fastest-charging 1kWh portable power station is competing directly against units that normally cost half as much, making it the strongest value argument in this category this week.

highlights.title: EcoFlow Delta 3 Plus Leads on the Specs-to-Price Ratio That Matters
highlights.body: The Delta 3 Plus's 1024Wh capacity, 2400W AC output, and 1-hour recharge time together represent the best combination of power and convenience in the mid-range category. The 1-hour recharge time alone differentiates it from competitors that take 2-3 hours for equivalent capacity.

highlights.title: LiFePO4 Chemistry Is Now Universal at the Top of the Market
highlights.body: All top-tier portable power stations in 2026 use Lithium Iron Phosphate chemistry with 10+ year daily-use lifespans and inherent thermal stability advantages over older lithium-ion cells. This has become the minimum expected standard rather than a differentiating feature, which pushes competition back to capacity, output, and charging speed.

highlights.title: EcoFlow Delta Pro 3 Dominates the Home Backup Category
highlights.body: The Delta Pro 3's 4kWh base capacity and expandability to 12kWh put it in a different use case from the mid-range stations. For whole-home backup applications that need to sustain 240V appliances over multi-day outages, the Delta Pro 3 continues to be the only answer worth recommending in this list.

zh-tw.commentary: 這週攜帶式電源站的新聞主要圍繞在大幅降價。Amazon 在 EcoFlow、Bluetti、Anker 和 Jackery 上都推出顯著折扣，Anker SOLIX C1000 Gen 2 降至 428.99 美元（約 NT$14,100），比 799 美元的定價打了 46 折，這種折扣幅度會改變在觀望的人的判斷。EcoFlow Delta 3 Plus 繼續以 1024Wh 容量、2400W 輸出、1 小時充電的組合領跑整體排名，在中端市場維持最具說服力的規格性價比。Bluetti Elite 200 V2 以更大的 2073Wh 容量和 2400W 輸出守住第二，對需要應付長時間停電或離網使用、容量比攜帶性更重要的場景是更好的選擇。EcoFlow Delta Pro 3 繼續主導全屋備電的搜尋熱度，4kWh 可擴充至 12kWh，它在不同的產品類別。Anker SOLIX C1000 Gen 2 在目前促銷價格下，是 1kWh 等級最強的性價比選擇，金氏世界紀錄的最快充電速度也支持了它的規格主張。

highlights.title: Anker SOLIX C1000 Gen 2 降到約 NT$14,100 是本週最強性價比
highlights.body: Amazon 的 4 月折扣把 Anker SOLIX C1000 Gen 2 從 799 美元降到 428.99 美元。在這個售價，這台打破金氏世界紀錄的最快充電 1kWh 攜帶式電源站正在和定價一半的機型直接競爭，是這週這個類別最強的性價比論點。

highlights.title: EcoFlow Delta 3 Plus 在規格性價比上領先
highlights.body: Delta 3 Plus 的 1024Wh 容量、2400W 交流輸出、1 小時充電時間的組合，是中端市場在功率和便利性上最好的綜合表現。光是 1 小時充電時間就讓它和需要 2-3 小時才能充滿同等容量的競爭對手拉開差距。

highlights.title: LiFePO4 電芯已成為頂端市場的普遍標準
highlights.body: 2026 年所有頂級攜帶式電源站都使用磷酸鐵鋰電芯，提供超過 10 年的每日使用壽命和比舊式鋰電池更好的熱穩定性。這已經從差異化功能變成最低預期標準，競爭重心回到容量、輸出和充電速度。

highlights.title: EcoFlow Delta Pro 3 在全屋備電類別無可撼動
highlights.body: Delta Pro 3 的 4kWh 基礎容量加上可擴充至 12kWh 讓它進入不同的使用場景，和中端機型不是同一個類別。對需要在多天停電期間維持 240V 家電運作的全屋備電需求，Delta Pro 3 依然是這個名單上唯一值得推薦的選項。

references.title: Best Portable Power Stations 2026: tested and ranked
The Best Portable Power Stations of 2026
Best Portable Power Station 2026: Top Picks for Camping and Home Backup

en.commentary:
The EcoFlow Delta 3 Plus holds first place for the most important reason in this category: charging speed. X-Stream charging brings the 1024Wh battery from 0 to 80% in 50 minutes — a specification that makes the difference between a power station you can meaningfully recharge on a campsite solar setup or a generator hookup versus one that takes all day. At $999 with 2600W output (X-Boost up to 3100W), it covers most household appliances during power outages including mid-sized air conditioners.

The Bluetti Elite 200 V2 takes second with a 2073Wh capacity that serves longer outage durations. Its LFP battery chemistry provides an industry-verified 6000 cycle lifespan — compared to the 3,500 cycle standard for most competitors — which means it outlasts the practical life of most households' need for backup power by a significant margin. The EcoFlow Delta Pro 3 at third doubles down on expandability: a 4kWh capacity that can scale to 12kWh with additional batteries makes it the correct choice for whole-home backup planning.

The Goal Zero Yeti 1500X ranks last because its value relative to current competition has declined significantly. At $2,000 for 1516Wh with a 1800W inverter and a 10A maximum charge rate, it delivers specifications that the EcoFlow Delta 3 Plus surpasses at half the price. Goal Zero's build quality and US customer support remain genuinely good, but the price-to-performance gap has widened to the point where recommending it as a primary choice is difficult to defend.

highlights.title: EcoFlow Delta 3 Plus leads through charging speed, not capacity
highlights.body: 0 to 80% in 50 minutes via X-Stream is the fastest charging speed in the sub-$1000 category. For camping trips where solar input is limited to midday hours, or emergency use where recharge time affects preparedness, this matters more than raw watt-hours. The 2600W continuous output (X-Boost 3100W) handles household appliances that lower-output competitors cannot. At $999, nothing else in this capacity tier provides comparable charging speed.

highlights.title: Bluetti Elite 200 V2 is the best choice for long-duration home backup
highlights.body: 2073Wh LFP battery with 6000-cycle lifespan addresses the total cost of ownership argument. At 6000 cycles, the Bluetti outlasts the useful life of most home backup scenarios, meaning the higher upfront cost amortizes over a genuinely longer service period. 2200W continuous output covers refrigerator, CPAP, and lighting simultaneously. For households planning for multi-day outage scenarios, the capacity-to-longevity ratio is the decisive factor.

highlights.title: EcoFlow Delta Pro 3 is the right choice for whole-home expandable backup
highlights.body: Starting at 4kWh and expandable to 12kWh, the Delta Pro 3 is designed for whole-home backup rather than camping or single-appliance use. LFP chemistry, 3600W continuous output (X-Boost 4800W), and EcoFlow's Smart Home Panel compatibility make it the foundation for off-grid power planning. The price at $2,499 reflects the professional-grade specification — this is not a consumer device that also works for home backup.

highlights.title: Goal Zero Yeti 1500X has fallen behind current competition on value
highlights.body: At $2,000 for 1516Wh and 1800W inverter, the Yeti 1500X offers specifications that EcoFlow and Bluetti alternatives at half the price now surpass. Goal Zero's build quality and US-based customer support are genuinely excellent, and the Yeti line remains reliable in field conditions. But the pricing makes it defensible only for buyers who specifically value the Goal Zero ecosystem or have existing accessory compatibility requirements.

zh-tw.commentary:
EcoFlow Delta 3 Plus 排第一，理由是這個類別最重要的規格：充電速度。X-Stream 充電可以在 50 分鐘內把 1024Wh 電池從零充到 80%，這讓它在露營太陽能設置或停電緊急使用的場景下，實際可用性遠高於需要整天充電的競品。NT$31,000 左右的售價，2600W 輸出（X-Boost 可到 3100W），覆蓋大多數家電包含中型空調。

Bluetti Elite 200 V2 排第二，靠的是 2073Wh 的容量和 LFP 電池的 6000 次循環壽命，遠超過大多數競品的 3,500 次標準。這意味著它的實際使用壽命比大多數家庭對備用電源的需求還長，更高的初始成本分攤到更長的服務期間後，總持有成本的論據很強。EcoFlow Delta Pro 3 排第三，4kWh 起步可擴展到 12kWh，是整棟住宅備用電源規劃的正確選擇。

Goal Zero Yeti 1500X 排最後，是因為它相對於現有競爭對手的價值已經落後太多。NT$65,000 左右買 1516Wh 和 1800W 逆變器，這個規格 EcoFlow 半價的產品就能超越。Goal Zero 的做工和美國客服支援依然很好，但性價比差距已經大到很難把它列為主要推薦。

highlights.body: 2073Wh LFP 電池、6000 次循環壽命，比大多數競品的 3,500 次高很多。6000 次代表它的實際壽命超過大多數家庭對備用電源的需求，更高的初始成本分攤到更長的服務期間，總持有成本的論據很有說服力。2200W 持續輸出可以同時維持冰箱、CPAP 和照明。需要應對多天停電的家庭，容量對壽命的比值是決定性因素。

highlights.title: EcoFlow Delta Pro 3 是全屋可擴展備用電源的正確選擇
highlights.body: 從 4kWh 起步可擴展到 12kWh，Delta Pro 3 是為全屋備用電源而設計的，不是露營或單一電器用途。LFP 電池、3600W 持續輸出（X-Boost 4800W），搭配 EcoFlow 智慧家庭面板的相容性，是離網供電規劃的基礎。NT$77,000 左右的售價反映了專業等級的規格，這不是同時也能做家庭備用的消費電子，它就是為家庭備用而生的。

highlights.title: Goal Zero Yeti 1500X 在現有競爭中的性價比已明顯落後
highlights.body: NT$65,000 左右，1516Wh 和 1800W 逆變器，這個規格 EcoFlow 和 Bluetti 半價的替代品都超越了。Goal Zero 的做工和美國本地客服支援確實很好，Yeti 系列在野外條件下的可靠性有多年記錄。但定價讓它只對特別重視 Goal Zero 生態系或有現有配件相容需求的買家才說得過去。

references.title: Best Portable Power Stations of 2026

Bluetti Elite 200 V2 at rank 2 earns its spot with the industry's best expandability story — add satellite batteries to reach 6kWh or more, and the solar charging efficiency is the highest in the category. Bluetti made news this week launching the EnergyPro 13K, a $8,799 whole-home backup system with 13kWh capacity — a different product class, but it signals Bluetti's continued investment in the storage category. EcoFlow Delta Pro 3 at rank 3 is the pick for users who need both maximum portable capacity and home integration: the 4000W output and up to 48kWh expandable capacity make it the serious home backup option.

highlights.title: EcoFlow Delta 3 Plus Wins on Charging Speed and Value
highlights.body: Fully charged in one hour from a wall outlet — that's the key specification that separates EcoFlow from competitors who charge in 2-3 hours. Combined with 1024Wh LiFePO4 chemistry rated for 3,000+ cycles, the Delta 3 Plus delivers the most practical combination of fast replenishment and long service life in the portable class.

highlights.title: Bluetti Elite 200 V2 Has the Best Expandability Architecture
highlights.body: The ability to chain additional battery modules gives the Elite 200 V2 a capacity ceiling that no fixed-battery portable station can match. highlights.title: Anker Solix C1000 Gen2 Leads on Portability and Speed

references.title: Best Portable Power Stations 2026: Tested and Ranked
EcoFlow Delta 3 Plus Review: Fast Charging Leader

en.commentary:
EcoFlow's Delta 3 Plus holds the top position in the portable power station category for April 2026. The key metric that separates it is charging speed: 800W AC wall charging to 80% in 50 minutes is the fastest recharge rate in its capacity class. For camping, emergency backup, and van travel, the difference between a 50-minute charge and a 2-hour charge is practical — it determines whether you recharge while cooking dinner or whether you plan your entire day around power availability.

Bluetti Elite 200 V2 at rank 2 offers the highest capacity-to-price ratio in the list. At 2,073Wh with 2,400W AC output, it handles most home appliances — refrigerators, air conditioners, medical devices — during outages. The dual-charging system allows simultaneous solar and AC input, and the GreenPower technology manages battery chemistry to extend cycle life beyond 3,500 full charges.

EcoFlow Delta Pro 3 at rank 3 is the home backup specialist. Its 4,096Wh base capacity with expandable battery packs scales to 25kWh, which covers multi-day home power needs during extended outages. The Smart Generator feature automatically triggers charging when battery level drops below a threshold, which is essential for unattended backup systems.

Goal Zero Yeti 1500X at rank 8 is the only unit on this list that shows its age. Its charging speed — 360W maximum — is less than half of what EcoFlow and Bluetti deliver, and the price-per-watt-hour is the least competitive in this group. It earns its place on reliability alone: Goal Zero's customer service record and warranty performance are the best in the industry, and for users who prioritize long-term support over specifications, the Yeti remains a defensible purchase.

highlights.title: EcoFlow Delta 3 Plus: fastest recharge rate in its class changes how you use a power station
highlights.body: Eight hundred watts of AC charging to 80% in 50 minutes is a fundamentally different use case than a power station that takes 2 hours for the same result. The Delta 3 Plus can fully recharge during a lunch break, between activities at a campsite, or in the time it takes to run a meeting. Combined with simultaneous solar and AC input up to 1,100W total, it handles energy replenishment in a way that removes the range-anxiety equivalent from portable power. At $999, it costs less than the Bluetti Elite 200 V2 while offering substantially faster charging.

highlights.title: Bluetti Elite 200 V2: 2,073Wh capacity with 3,500+ cycle battery chemistry
highlights.body: Most lithium iron phosphate (LiFePO4) batteries in portable power stations are rated for 2,000-3,000 cycles. Bluetti's GreenPower technology in the Elite 200 V2 extends this to 3,500+ cycles with 80% capacity retention. At one cycle per day, this represents nearly 10 years of daily use before the battery degrades to 80% of its original capacity. Combined with 2,400W AC output that handles demanding appliances like window air conditioners and power tools, the Elite 200 V2 is the long-term investment case for home emergency backup.

highlights.title: Jackery Explorer 2000 Plus: the solar-optimized option for off-grid scenarios
highlights.body: The Explorer 2000 Plus accepts up to 1,000W of solar input from compatible Jackery SolarSaga panels, which at peak solar hours can deliver a meaningful share of its 2,042Wh capacity in a single day. The Explorer app's solar estimation feature uses location and weather data to predict charging output before setup, which is useful for planning off-grid trips. The lower AC recharge speed (500W maximum) is the main limitation for home backup use, but for dedicated van life and extended camping, the solar optimization makes it the most capable off-grid option at its price point.

zh-tw.commentary:

Bluetti Elite 200 V2 排第二，提供這份清單裡最高的容量對價格比。2,073Wh 加上 2,400W AC 輸出，能在停電時應付大多數家用電器，包括冰箱、冷氣和醫療設備。雙輸入系統允許太陽能和 AC 同時充電，GreenPower 電池化學管理讓循環壽命超過 3,500 次完整充放電。

Goal Zero Yeti 1500X 排第八，是這份清單裡唯一明顯顯現老化的產品。最高 360W 的充電速度不到 EcoFlow 和 Bluetti 的一半，每瓦時的售價是這組產品裡最沒有競爭力的。它靠可靠性留住位置：Goal Zero 的客服記錄和保固執行是業界最好的，對於把長期售後支援放在規格前面的用戶，Yeti 依然是合理的選擇。

highlights.title: EcoFlow Delta 3 Plus 最快的補電速度從根本上改變了攜帶式電源的使用方式
highlights.body: 800W AC 充電 50 分鐘到 80%，和需要 2 小時才能達到相同結果的電源供應器在使用情境上是本質的差距。Delta 3 Plus 可以在午休時間完整補電，在露營地活動間隙充電，或者在開一場會議的時間補滿。搭配最高 1,100W 的太陽能加 AC 同時輸入，它處理能量補充的方式消除了攜帶式電源的里程焦慮。999 美元的售價比 Bluetti Elite 200 V2 低，充電速度卻快了非常多。

highlights.body: 大多數攜帶式電源供應器的磷酸鐵鋰電池標示 2,000-3,000 次循環壽命。Bluetti 的 GreenPower 技術讓 Elite 200 V2 達到 3,500 次以上，保持 80% 容量保留率。每天一次循環計算，這代表接近 10 年的日常使用，電池才降到初始容量的 80%。搭配 2,400W AC 輸出可以應付窗式冷氣和電動工具等高耗電設備，Elite 200 V2 是家用緊急備電的長期投資選擇。

highlights.title: Jackery Explorer 2000 Plus 是離網場景的太陽能優化選項
highlights.body: Explorer 2000 Plus 支援最高 1,000W 的 Jackery SolarSaga 太陽能板輸入，在峰值日照時數可以在一天內補充 2,042Wh 容量的可觀部分。Explorer App 的太陽能預估功能根據位置和天氣數據預測充電輸出，在規劃離網旅行前非常實用。較低的 AC 補電速度（最高 500W）是家用備電場景的主要限制，但對於專注在車宿生活和長途露營的用戶，太陽能優化讓它在這個價位帶成為最強的離網選項。

references.title: 6 Best Portable Power Stations of 2026 — The Inertia Tested
6 Bestselling Portable Power Stations for Spring 2026
EcoFlow Delta Pro 3 earns 'Best Whole-Home Backup' from Popular Mechanics
Jackery vs EcoFlow vs Bluetti: Which Power Station Brand is Best in 2026?

en.commentary:
The portable power station market in spring 2026 is defined by three technology shifts that have collectively raised the baseline quality: LiFePO4 battery chemistry is now standard across the mid-range and premium tiers, fast charging under two hours is table stakes for any serious product, and output wattage in the 2,000W to 3,000W range is the new normal for mid-range units. The result is that today's best portable power stations are meaningfully better than equivalently priced units from two years ago across every relevant dimension.

EcoFlow Delta 3 Plus holds the top ranking through the best balance of capacity, charging speed, and value in the everyday use tier. The X-Stream technology charges from 0 to 80% in under an hour from a wall outlet, which is the single most impactful specification for users who need to top off between uses rather than manage a dedicated power infrastructure. Popular Mechanics named the EcoFlow Delta Pro 3 their Best Whole-Home Backup pick for 2026 — the Pro 3's expandable capacity and 3600W output make it the choice for users with whole-house backup requirements rather than portable field use.

Bluetti Elite 200 V2 holds second through superior expandability and a 2,048Wh capacity that provides more usable energy between charges than the EcoFlow Delta 3 Plus. Bluetti's latest Energypro 13K product announcement signals continued investment in large-scale modular home backup systems, but the Elite 200 V2 remains their strongest entry for portable field and camping use. Goal Zero Yeti 1500x stays at the bottom of the ranking — excellent reliability and a respected brand, but the charging speed (5 hours to full from AC) and price premium relative to current EcoFlow and Bluetti options make it a difficult recommendation in 2026.

highlights.title: EcoFlow Delta 3 Plus leads because sub-60-minute charging transforms how you use a power station
highlights.body: A power station you can charge in under an hour while watching a show is functionally different from one that requires four hours of wall time. EcoFlow's X-Stream technology delivers 0 to 80% in 50 minutes from AC, which means the Delta 3 Plus can be fully topped off between uses on a normal household schedule without requiring dedicated charging windows. The 1,024Wh base capacity handles most camping and emergency use cases, and the 1,800W AC output powers most household appliances including refrigerators and air conditioners.

highlights.title: LiFePO4 chemistry is now the 2026 baseline — anything without it is a significant step down in longevity
highlights.body: All three top-ranked power stations use LiFePO4 battery chemistry, which delivers 3,000 to 3,500 rated charge cycles versus 500 to 800 cycles for NMC chemistry used in older budget units. At an average use frequency of two to three charges per month, LiFePO4 translates to over a decade of rated lifespan. For a product with a $500 to $1,000+ price tag, chemistry longevity is the most consequential spec that buyers should verify before purchase.

highlights.title: EcoFlow Delta Pro 3 is the right call for whole-home backup requirements
highlights.body: Popular Mechanics' Best Whole-Home Backup designation for the Delta Pro 3 reflects its 3600W AC output and expandable battery capacity that can be configured for whole-house backup scenarios. The base 3,600Wh capacity handles most household loads, and EcoFlow's battery expansion module lets the system scale to 25Wh for extended outage scenarios. For users who need backup for an entire household rather than portable field use, the Delta Pro 3's output and expandability make it the premium choice in the EcoFlow lineup.

EcoFlow Delta 3 Plus 靠容量、充電速度和性價比的最佳組合排第一。X-Stream 技術從牆插充電 50 分鐘就能到 80%，這是對需要在使用間隔補電而不是管理固定電力基礎設施的用戶影響最大的規格。Popular Mechanics 評選 EcoFlow Delta Pro 3 為 2026 年最佳整棟家庭備份方案，Delta Pro 3 的可擴展容量和 3600 瓦輸出適合有全屋備份需求的用戶。

Bluetti Elite 200 V2 靠 2048Wh 容量和可擴展性排第二，提供比 Delta 3 Plus 更多的單次充電可用電量。Goal Zero Yeti 1500x 排在最後，可靠性和品牌都值得信賴，但充電速度（AC 充滿需要約 5 小時）和相對現在的 EcoFlow 和 Bluetti 選項的溢價，讓它在 2026 年很難推薦。

highlights.title: EcoFlow Delta 3 Plus 排第一，不到一小時充電改變了行動電源站的使用體驗
highlights.body: 50 分鐘能充到 80% 的電源站在功能性上和需要四小時充電的機器是不同的產品。Delta 3 Plus 讓你在正常的家庭作息裡隨手補電，不需要規劃充電窗口。1024Wh 基本容量覆蓋大多數露營和緊急備用場景，1800 瓦 AC 輸出能跑大多數家用電器包括冰箱和冷氣。

highlights.title: 磷酸鐵鋰是 2026 年的基準，沒有這個化學的產品壽命差距很大
highlights.body: 三個排名前列的電源站都使用磷酸鐵鋰電池，提供 3000 到 3500 個額定充電循環，相比舊款預算機使用的三元鋰電池的 500 到 800 次循環差距是六倍。以每月兩到三次的平均使用頻率計算，磷酸鐵鋰等於超過十年的額定壽命。在定價 NT$15,000 到 NT$30,000 以上的產品，電池化學的壽命是購買前最值得確認的規格。

highlights.title: EcoFlow Delta Pro 3 是有全屋備份需求用戶的正確選擇
highlights.body: Popular Mechanics 的最佳整棟家庭備份認可反映了 Delta Pro 3 的 3600 瓦輸出和可擴展容量，基本款 3600Wh 加 EcoFlow 的電池擴展模組可以配置為覆蓋整棟房屋長時間停電的系統。對需要整棟家庭備份而不只是野外攜帶使用的用戶，Delta Pro 3 的輸出和擴展性是 EcoFlow 產品線裡最強的旗艦選擇。

6 Bestselling Portable Power Stations for Spring
6 Best Portable Power Stations of 2026

en.commentary:
Earth Day falls on April 22, and both EcoFlow and Bluetti are running their biggest sale events of the year this week. These aren't minor discounts. EcoFlow has historically offered 40-62% reductions during Earth Day campaigns, and Bluetti's track record follows a similar pattern. If you have been on the fence about a portable power station, buying this week rather than waiting for Black Friday is defensible. The delta between Earth Day pricing and normal retail is substantial.

The EcoFlow Delta 3 Plus remains the correct buy at rank one. I've tracked the 1kWh tier closely, and the gap between what the Delta 3 Plus delivers and what competitors offer has not closed meaningfully this cycle. X-Stream charging to 80% in under an hour is the specification that makes the biggest real-world difference. When you're at a campsite with four hours of solar peak, or when a storm warning gives you 90 minutes of grid power before potential outage, that charging speed is the difference between having a useful power reserve and not. At $549 or less during Earth Day pricing, the case is closed.

EcoFlow also launched the TRAIL 300 DC at $199 this week. It's a 288Wh unit targeting outdoor enthusiasts with a DC-only output profile that powers car fridges, CPAP machines, and charging devices without the weight penalty of an AC inverter. That's a different product for a different buyer than the Delta 3 Plus, but the $199 entry point into the EcoFlow ecosystem is the most accessible it has ever been.

Popular Mechanics' designation of the EcoFlow Delta Pro 3 as Best Whole-Home Backup is deserved. At rank three, the Delta Pro 3's 4kWh base capacity with expandability to 48kWh, 3600W continuous output, and split-phase 240V support places it in a category that no other portable station on this list enters. For homeowners who treat backup power as infrastructure rather than a camping accessory, the Delta Pro 3 is the only recommendation that scales appropriately. Popular Science's recognition of the Bluetti Elite 200 V2 as Best Overall reflects the unit's 2kWh at $899 proposition, which compresses a genuinely large capacity into a chassis that remains portable.

highlights.title: Earth Day Week Is the Right Time to Buy: EcoFlow and Bluetti Running Best Deals of the Year
highlights.body: EcoFlow and Bluetti Earth Day sales historically offer the deepest discounts outside of Black Friday. The Delta 3 Plus at its sale price and the Bluetti Elite 200 V2 at its Earth Day pricing represent the most cost-efficient entry points into the premium portable power station market in 2026. Waiting for a better price is not a reliable strategy. Earth Day and Black Friday are the two windows where these brands consistently offer meaningful reductions.

highlights.title: EcoFlow TRAIL 300 DC at $199 Expands the Entry Point for Outdoor Buyers
highlights.body: The TRAIL 300 DC's 288Wh capacity and DC-only output design targets a buyer that the Delta 3 Plus doesn't serve as efficiently: the outdoor enthusiast who needs to power a car fridge, CPAP, or device charging without the weight and cost of a full AC inverter. At $199, it's the most accessible EcoFlow unit ever built, and the DC output focus means actual efficiency losses are lower than AC-converting alternatives. It doesn't replace the Delta 3 Plus for most buyers, but it fills a gap that the lineup previously didn't address.

highlights.title: Popular Mechanics Names Delta Pro 3 Best Whole-Home Backup: the Validation Is Accurate
highlights.body: The EcoFlow Delta Pro 3's split-phase 240V support is what earns this designation. Most portable power stations cap at 120V output, which excludes a homeowner's most energy-intensive loads: HVAC compressors, electric dryers, and Level 2 EV charging. The Delta Pro 3 handles these through its 240V split-phase connection. Combined with 26 recharging paths and expandability to 48kWh, it is the only unit on this list that can realistically serve as a multi-day whole-home backup solution. For homeowners in hurricane or wildfire corridors where outages extend beyond 24 hours, this capability changes the math significantly.

highlights.title: LiFePO4 Chemistry Has Won: Every Unit Worth Recommending Uses It
highlights.body: The battery chemistry question that defined purchasing decisions two years ago is settled. Every power station I recommend uses lithium iron phosphate cells rated for at least 3,000 cycles. That 3,000-cycle baseline translates to over eight years of daily use before the battery degrades to 80% of its original capacity. For a product in the $500-$2,000 range, this longevity changes the total cost of ownership calculation entirely. The goal is now longer than 3,000 cycles. Bluetti's 6,000-cycle rating on the Elite 200 V2 is the current benchmark.

zh-tw.commentary:

EcoFlow Delta 3 Plus 繼續排第一，理由沒有改變。我持續追蹤 1kWh 等級的競爭，Delta 3 Plus 和競品的差距這一波沒有縮小。X-Stream 在一小時內充到 80% 是實際使用差異最大的規格，在露營地只有四小時太陽能峰值電力，或颱風警報前只剩九十分鐘市電的情境，這個充電速度決定了你到底有沒有備用電力。地球日促銷價台幣約 NT$17,000，理由充分。

EcoFlow 同時推出了 TRAIL 300 DC，售價 199 美元。288Wh、純 DC 輸出，針對需要車載冰箱、CPAP 或設備充電、但不需要交流逆變器重量和成本的戶外用戶。這是不同的產品給不同的買家，但 199 美元進入 EcoFlow 生態系是這個品牌有史以來最低的門檻。

Popular Mechanics 把 EcoFlow Delta Pro 3 選為最佳全屋備電方案，這個評選是準確的。4kWh 基礎容量可擴展到 48kWh、3600W 持續輸出、支援 240V 分相供電，這些規格讓 Delta Pro 3 進入了清單裡其他機器根本進不去的使用場景。把備電當作基礎設施而非露營附件的房屋業主，Delta Pro 3 是唯一規模合適的推薦。Popular Science 把 Bluetti Elite 200 V2 選為最佳整體方案，反映了這台在 NT$29,000 價格下提供 2kWh 的密度，在保持可攜帶性的機身裡壓縮了真正大的容量。

highlights.title: 地球日這週是今年入手最好的時機：EcoFlow 和 Bluetti 辦年度最強促銷
highlights.body: EcoFlow 和 Bluetti 的地球日促銷歷史上是這兩個品牌在黑色星期五以外折扣最深的窗口。Delta 3 Plus 的促銷價和 Bluetti Elite 200 V2 的地球日定價是 2026 年進入旗艦行動電源站市場成本最低的時間點。等到下次好價格的策略不可靠，地球日和黑色星期五是這兩個品牌持續提供有意義折扣的兩個時間節點。

highlights.title: EcoFlow TRAIL 300 DC 用 199 美元把入場門檻拉到最低
highlights.body: TRAIL 300 DC 的 288Wh 容量和純 DC 輸出設計針對 Delta 3 Plus 無法有效服務的買家：需要車載冰箱、CPAP 或設備充電、但不需要 AC 逆變器重量和成本的戶外用戶。199 美元是 EcoFlow 有史以來最低的入場費，純 DC 輸出讓實際效率損耗低於需要 AC 轉換的替代方案。它不取代 Delta 3 Plus，但它填補了產品線過去沒有覆蓋到的需求。

highlights.title: Popular Mechanics 選 Delta Pro 3 為最佳全屋備電：這個評選是準確的
highlights.body: EcoFlow Delta Pro 3 的 240V 分相輸出是它拿到這個評選的理由。大多數行動電源站只能輸出 120V，排除了家裡最高耗電的負載：暖氣和冷氣壓縮機、電動烘衣機、Level 2 電動車充電。Delta Pro 3 透過 240V 分相連接覆蓋這些需求。結合 26 種充電路徑和擴展到 48kWh 的能力，它是清單裡唯一能作為多天全屋備電方案的選手。住在颱風或野火路徑區、停電可能超過 24 小時的業主，這個能力從根本上改變了購買計算。

highlights.title: LiFePO4 已經勝出：值得推薦的機器全都用它
highlights.body: 兩年前還是購買決策核心爭議的電池化學問題現在已經解決。清單裡每台我推薦的機器都使用磷酸鐵鋰電池，額定至少 3,000 個循環。3,000 循環基準換算成每天使用超過八年後電池才降到初始容量的 80%。對 NT$15,000 到 NT$65,000 這個價格範圍的產品，這個壽命從根本上改變了總持有成本的計算。現在的競爭在於超過 3,000 循環，Bluetti Elite 200 V2 的 6,000 循環評定是目前的標竿。

references.title: Best portable power stations 2026: tested and ranked

en.commentary: Portable power station rankings hold steady this week. The EcoFlow Delta 3 Plus holds #1 on charging speed and value — 9.5 on both metrics. en.commentary:

highlights.title: EcoFlow Delta 3 Plus 同時在五個維度做到最頂，這是排第一的真正理由
highlights.body: 1.3 小時充電、1,800W AC 輸出、1,024Wh 容量，三個數字同時很強，這在儲能產品裡需要工程上的取捨，Delta 3 Plus 基本上沒有讓你覺得妥協的地方。特賣期間低於 NT$26,000，整份名單裡性價比最難反駁。

highlights.title: Jackery Explorer 1500 Ultra 的 IP65 防護等級讓它能去其他儲能電站去不了的戶外場景
highlights.body: IP65 防塵防水加全密封端口、防震認證、1 米摔落測試，在需要應對雨水、沙塵、實體撞擊的露營、越野、工地場景，這款是 NT$30,000 以下唯一有這個防護等級的主流選擇。ChargeShield 2.0 的 1.5 小時快充確保你需要它的時候它有電。

highlights.title: Bluetti Elite 200 V2 是太陽能離網自主供電的最佳選擇
highlights.body: 1,000W 太陽能輸入上限讓它在 2-3 小時內靠太陽能充滿，這對真正想要不依賴市電的離網使用場景是決定性的規格。Popular Science 2026 年「最佳整體」評選反映的是全面測試的綜合成績，太陽能充電能力是你選它的核心理由。

highlights.title: EcoFlow Delta Pro 3 是輸出功率是首要需求時的正確選擇
highlights.body: 4,000W 持續輸出搭配 4kWh 可擴展電池，讓它能帶動中段以下的儲能產品推不動的高功耗電器。冷氣、大型電動工具、電磁爐這類需要 2,000W 以上的設備，Delta Pro 3 是這份名單裡唯一能可靠供電的選擇，這個功率需求的用戶沒有其他選項。

references.title: Earth Day power station sales: EcoFlow, Bluetti, Anker SOLIX
Bluetti vs EcoFlow vs Jackery 2026: Which Brand Should You Buy?
Best Portable Power Stations of 2026, Tested and Reviewed

en.commentary: EcoFlow Delta 3 Plus holds the top position in April 2026 with a combination that mid-range buyers consistently prioritize: 1024Wh LiFePO4 capacity, 2400W output, and EcoFlow's X-Stream charging that reaches 80% in 50 minutes. The Earth Day sales period in mid-April has pushed pricing down across the portable power station category — EcoFlow, Bluetti, and Anker all ran promotions this week. The Bluetti Elite 200 V2 earns second for buyers who prioritize capacity over charging speed: 2,073Wh is the most capacity available at this price tier, and Bluetti's cell quality is competitive with EcoFlow on longevity. EcoFlow Delta Pro 3 at third is the home backup tier — 4,000W continuous output with expandable capacity is a different product category from portable camping stations.

highlights.title: EcoFlow Delta 3 Plus Charges to 80% in 50 Minutes
highlights.body: X-Stream AC charging at 1,800W means you can top up the Delta 3 Plus during a lunch break. For emergency preparedness and camping use where access to AC power is intermittent, fast charging speed matters more than raw capacity.

highlights.title: Bluetti Elite 200 V2 Delivers the Most Capacity at This Price
highlights.body: 2,073Wh in a package priced comparably to 1,000Wh EcoFlow units gives Bluetti the capacity-per-dollar advantage at the upper-mid tier. LiFePO4 cells rated for 3,500 cycles ensure the investment holds up over years of regular use.

highlights.title: Earth Day Sales Drive Meaningful Price Drops Across the Category
highlights.body: April 11-20 saw significant discounts from EcoFlow, Bluetti, and Anker on their mid-range units. If you've been waiting on a portable power station purchase, the current pricing environment reflects a meaningful reduction from Q1 2026 MSRP.

zh-tw.commentary: EcoFlow Delta 3 Plus 在 2026 年 4 月繼續排第一，1024Wh LiFePO4 電池、2400W 輸出、X-Stream 快充 50 分鐘到 80%，這個組合在中階行動電源站的性價比找不到對手。地球日前後整個分類都有促銷，EcoFlow、Bluetti 和 Anker 這週都有在跑特價。Bluetti Elite 200 V2 以 2,073Wh 的最高容量拿第二，同價位裡容量最大，LiFePO4 電芯循環壽命也有競爭力。EcoFlow Delta Pro 3 是居家備用電力等級，4,000W 持續輸出加上可擴充容量，是不同的使用場景。

highlights.title: EcoFlow Delta 3 Plus 50 分鐘充到 80%
highlights.body: X-Stream AC 快充 1,800W，午休就能充飽大半電力，對緊急備用或露營間歇充電的場景來說，快充速度比容量更重要。

highlights.title: Bluetti Elite 200 V2 這個價位容量最大
highlights.body: 2,073Wh 在這個價位段是最大容量，LiFePO4 電芯 3,500 次循環壽命讓投資長期維持價值。如果你最在意容量，Bluetti 在這層是正確選擇。

highlights.title: 地球日特賣讓整個分類的價格明顯下降
highlights.body: EcoFlow、Bluetti、Anker 在 4 月 11-20 日都有針對中階產品的折扣，如果你一直在等好時機入手，現在的售價比 2026 年第一季的原價便宜很多。
